entry.title: IDC 91003123D0001 (P00030) awarded to MAXIMUS EDUCATION, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00030 IS TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS OF CR 7067 - JOINT CONSOLIDATION LOAN SEPARATION - PHASE 1.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 91003123D0001 (P00031) awarded to MAXIMUS EDUCATION, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE THE PRICING STRUCTURE DUE TO THE LATEST EMPLOYMENT COST INDEX RELEASE, IAW THE ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT TERMS METHODOLOGY WITHIN THE CONTRACT CLAUSES. THE REVISED PRICES ARE EFFECTIVE SEPTEMBER 1, 2024.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
